title: Directory of academic and policy exchange schemes
body: "The directory of academic and policy exchange programmes is designed to connect academics and policy professionals. These programmes foster impactful collaborations and support career development, offering opportunities for both academics seeking policy experience and policy professionals seeking academic insights. There are two directories: one for academics looking for policy exchanges and one for policy staff looking for academic exchanges. Exchanges include secondments/fellowships, internships/placements, and capacity-building programmes. "
